svg.script: function handleClick(element) { const adcode = element.getAttribute('data-adcode'); const name = element.getAttribute('data-name'); const centerLng = element.getAttribute('data-center-lng'); const centerLat = element.getAttribute('data-center-lat'); const parentAdcode = element.getAttribute('data-parent-adcode'); const cityInfo = { adcode: adcode, name: name, center_lng: centerLng, center_lat: centerLat, parent_adcode: parentAdcode }; if (typeof Android !== 'undefined' && Android.onCityClicked) { Android.onCityClicked(JSON.stringify(cityInfo)); } else { console.log('City clicked:', cityInfo); alert('点击了: ' + name + ' (adcode: ' + adcode + ')'); } }
